\n<Margo>She was a bit reckless though, as soon as she

\n<Margo>I see,well we found Angel and this terminal is

\n<Silvy>I managed to open the file that Angel was
checking, there's a loading bar that won't stop and

stuff please come I need your help
\n<Seline>Girls you stay here check on Angel, prof
Margo take this walkie-talkie if Angel is supposed to

\n<Albert>This situation is surreal, it's like being in

of some kind, Silvy standing in a dungeon looking for

\n<Albert>I need to find Morgana...Better talk to her
in private, she's usually alone on the roof at evening....
WHERE THE HECK HAVE YOU BEEN?
I'VE BEEN KNOCKING FOR TWO HOURS...
\n<Silvy>Listen come to the control room as soon as you
can, we need to talk about some things I don't want to

\n<Silvy>OK see you soon....don't take too long...
It's Albert, we have news, can you open?
What on earth happened to her....
Forgive me Albert...I can't control myself
I feel my body on fire I can't resist
I feel it...all the sperm inside my womb...
